span.p:
Compare WARMS vs V&V DB
Identify new records
Detect ownership changes
Detect title deed changes

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
GIS overlay: property boundaries
on current satellite imagery
Compare with WARMS registrations
Flag unregistered water use

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Categorise all FileMaster records:
• Completed (validated)
• Verification complete, awaiting validation
• In Section 35 process (incomplete)
• Not yet started

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Compile report:
• Scope of catchment
• Total records, new records, status breakdown
• Resource plan and timeline
Signed off by Regional Manager

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Large-scale WMA-level launch
Media, industry, organised agriculture
Inform stakeholders of process & timelines
Individual & opening sessions
